nodes.label: Secondary CI Workflow (test.yml — Linux-only)
nodes.rationale: Older/parallel pipeline also named 'CI': lint, mypy, pytest with coverage + codecov upload, package build, and Docker buildx — but runs ONLY on ubuntu-latest (Linux) with Python 3.10-3.12. Linux coverage is duplicated with ci.yml; macOS/Windows coverage exists only in ci.yml.
